full_text:
Mao Jia 毛嘉
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Mao Jia (毛嘉)was born in Henei. A joke among the court, Cao Rui held drinking parties at his house. Mao Jia was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
